## Which contract does it touch

* [ ] new widget (`widgets/`)
* [ ] new theme (`themes/`)
* [ ] new layout (`layouts/`)
* [ ] new package helper (`packages/`)
* [ ] CLI / tooling (`tools/`)
* [ ] contract change (theme / layout / widget) — major version bump
